services/api-gateway/src/main/java/com/e.general_idea: Replaced the deprecated Eureka-specific annotation with the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation to align with modern Spring Cloud standards.
Removed the explicit MongoDB auditing annotation, likely relying on auto-configuration or a different mechanism in the newer stack.
Removed the explicit transaction management annotation, relying on Spring Boot's default auto-configuration for transaction management.
Removed the Feign client enabling annotation, possibly migrating to a different HTTP client strategy or relying on auto-configuration.
Added a bean definition for ProtobufModule to enable Jackson serialization/deserialization of Protocol Buffers.

services/order-service/src/main/java/com.general_idea: Renamed the package from com.example.Orders to com.example.orders to follow Java naming conventions.
Replaced specific Netflix Eureka and OpenFeign annotations with the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client annotation to decouple from specific implementations.

services/order-service/src/test/java/com.general_idea: Renamed the package from com.example.Orders to com.example.orders to follow Java naming conventions.

services/search-service/src/main/java/co.general_idea: Renamed the package from com.example.Search to com.example.search to follow Java naming conventions.
Enabled service discovery by adding the EnableDiscoveryClient annotation.

services/api-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Set the target Java version property to 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Update Spring Cloud BOM version to 2023.0.3 to match Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
Remove MongoDB starter dependency as it is no longer used in this service.
Add Redis starter dependency to replace or supplement data storage capabilities.
Remove OpenFeign starter dependency, likely replaced by gRPC or other mechanisms.
Remove Spring Security starter dependency from the project.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3.
Add gRPC client Spring Boot starter to enable gRPC communication.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC calls.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support.
Add javax.annotation-api to resolve missing annotations removed from Java 11+ module system.
Add Jackson datatype for protobuf to handle serialization/deserialization.
Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect OS for native dependencies.
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes.
Update the project description to reflect its role as an API Gateway/BFF.

services/order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.18 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 ecosystem.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to reflect the target runtime.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.3 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.x.
Define a specific Lombok version property for consistent dependency management.
Switch data persistence from MongoDB to JPA/SQL by replacing the starter dependency.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver to support the new JPA data store.
Remove Spring Cloud OpenFeign dependency, likely replacing it with gRPC or other mechanisms.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for asynchronous messaging capabilities.
Add Spring Data Redis dependency for caching or session management.
Remove explicit springdoc-openapi-ui dependency, likely relying on Spring Boot 3 auto-configuration or removing API docs.
Explicitly pin Lombok version to 1.18.32 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Add gRPC server starter to enable gRPC service endpoints.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side gRPC communication.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer serialization.
Add javax.annotation-api to replace removed Java EE annotations in Java 11+ (required for gRPC/Lombok compatibility).
Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect operating system for native tool downloads.
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes during build.
Update maven-compiler-plugin to target Java 21 source and target levels.
Configure Lombok as an annotation processor in the compiler plugin to ensure proper code generation.

services/search-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.x to 3.3.x to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to align with Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
Remove the explicit spring-boot.version property as it is now managed by the parent POM.
Replace the Solr client dependency with Spring Data Elasticsearch starter.
Add Spring Kafka dependency for message brokering support.
Add Netflix Eureka client starter for service discovery.
Add gRPC server Spring Boot starter for RPC support.
Add gRPC stub dependency for client-side RPC calls.
Add gRPC protobuf dependency for protocol buffer support.
Remove deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies in favor of SpringDoc (implied by Spring Boot 3 migration).
Add javax.annotation-api to replace annotations removed from the JDK in Java 11+ (required for gRPC/Spring Boot 3 compatibility).
Add OS Maven plugin extension to detect OS classifier for native dependencies.
Add protobuf-maven-plugin to compile .proto files into Java classes.
